bookmarks.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this bookmark?

sync.title: Syncing
sync.description: Sync your bookmarks across devices using an ID, encryption key, and shared secret. Your data is encrypted locally before being uploaded.
sync.generate_confirm: Generating new credentials will replace your current ones. If you have synced data on the server, you will lose access to it unless you have backed up the old credentials. Continue?

data.title: Data Management
data.purge_tooltip: Permanently remove bookmarks marked as deleted
data.purge_confirm: Permanently remove all bookmarks marked as deleted? Only do this if you are sure all your devices have synced the deletions.
data.clear_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete ALL bookmarks and settings? This cannot be undone.
data.import_no_changes: No new changes found in the backup file.
data.import_error: Failed to parse the backup file.
